name: Indian Healthcare Records Dataset
description: Anonymized healthcare records from Indian hospitals for medical research and AI model development.

name: Multi-lingual Indian Text Corpus
description: Large corpus of text data in 10 Indian languages for NLP research and model training.

name: Agricultural Crop Images Dataset
description: High-resolution images of various crops at different growth stages for computer vision applications.

name: Financial Transaction Patterns
description: Anonymized financial transaction data for fraud detection and risk analysis research.

name: Smart City IoT Sensor Data
description: Real-time sensor data from smart city infrastructure including traffic, air quality, and energy consumption.

name: Indian Climate Data Archive
description: Historical climate data from meteorological stations across India spanning 50+ years.

name: Biomedical Research Dataset
description: Genomic and proteomic data for drug discovery and personalized medicine research.
accessRequirement: IRB approval and data use agreement required
